calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-10-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day in Dept 218.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: V.Mack, Reporter: Rhonda Fung CSR #4819
Appearances:
Richard Lieberman, Esq., for Plaintiff The Granada, Inc., dba The Granada.
Tong Davidauskis, Property Manager for Plaintiff.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by Stipulation for entry of Judgment. Plaintiff is entitled to restitution and possession of the premises located at 1000 Sutter St., 03, San Francisco, CA. Writ of possession to issue immediately but is STAYED until JAN-31-2004 at 5:00PM. Each side to bear its own costs and attorney fees. If Defendant complies with the terms of this settlement, Plaintiff agrees to sign a Dismissal with prejudice, to be prepared by the Defendant. Plaintiff to prepare a written Stipulation for signature; Defendant agrees to sign and return same to Plaintiff within 48 hours of receipt.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
